calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Off Calendar

Ex Parte Application To Set Default Prove Up Hearing Re: Application And Request For Default Wdgment
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant Abbett Electric Corporation.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 11:07:25 a.m., pausing at 11:13:51 a.m. resuming at 11:23:43 a.m. and concluding at 11:31:44 a.m.(D505)

Katherine Anne Wenger, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff LH Bryant Street Owner via Zoom Video Conference.
Defendant Abbett Electric Corporation not appearing.
Witness Julian Marsh sworn to testify for the Plaintiff via Zoom Video Conference.

Counsel to provide a summary and offers proof as to the request for judgment to the court.
Counsel examines witness.
Court examines witness. Witness confirms that declarations and statements made are true and correct.
Court take a short break for computation of the pre-judgment interest.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

Damages $197,283.16
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $49,185.66
Attorney's Fees $10,000.00
Costs $945.07
Total Judgment $259,413.89

Proposed judgment as amended is signed and executed this day.
